name: Inland Real Estate Income Trust, Inc.
business: Inland Real Estate Income Trust, Inc. is a REIT that owns and manages a portfolio of commercial real estate investments in the United States. As of December 31, 2025, the company owned 52 retail properties totaling 7.2 million square feet, with a focus on grocery-anchored shopping centers.

exposures.sentence: The continued shift in retail sales towards e-commerce may continue to have an adverse impact on our tenants and our business.

catalysts.sentence: These plans were suspended during the board’s review of strategic alternatives but were recently reinstated effective February 1, 2026.
